headline: Yamal anointed the next Messi heading into WC 2026
summary: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente publicly compared Lamine Yamal to Lionel Messi ahead of the 2026 World Cup, saying he 'was born for this.' At 18, Yamal is the betting favorite for Young Player of the Tournament and is being framed as a face of the tournament after recovering from a groin scare in time for Spain's opener.
angles: Is 18-year-old Yamal already ahead of where teenage Messi was?
Can an 18-year-old genuinely carry Spain to a World Cup?
De la Fuente's 'next Messi' / 'born for this' quote — fair or overhype?
